name: 8" Stoneware Carved Ribbed Edge Grain Bowl Green - Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia
description:
Serve grains, cereals and more with the Stoneware Carved Ribbed Edge Grain Bowl from Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia. This grain bowl is designed in a round shape with asymmetric rim to add extra visual appeal to your table setting. Made of stoneware in a reactive glaze and glossy finish, this grain bowl is dishwasher- and microwave-safe for quick cleaning and easy reheating of food.

Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia: Gather • Create • Enjoy
